preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true

column.name: title
column.value: Medical Laboratory

column.name: objective
column.value: Complete medical laboratory workflow from patient registration to reporting

column.name: protocol
column.value: Standard Medical Laboratory Protocol

column.name: content
column.value: Medical Laboratory notebook template with 10 predefined workflow pages for patient registration, sample collection, processing, testing, and reporting.

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 1

changeSet.comment: Create Patient Registration page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Patient Registration

column.name: instructions
column.value: Register patients for the workflow. Enter demographic data (name, sex, age, contact). Link existing patients if already registered in the system.

column.name: content
column.value: Patient Registration - Register or link patients for lab orders

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 1

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 2

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Collection page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Collection

column.name: instructions
column.value: Collect specimens from patients. Record container type (EDTA vacutainer, plain tube, etc.), apply barcode label, record collector ID and collection time.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Collection - Phlebotomy and specimen labeling

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 2

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 3

changeSet.comment: Create Transport and Packaging page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Transport & Packaging

column.name: instructions
column.value: Document transport packaging compliance per IATA PI650. Check primary container (seal, barcode, absorbent), secondary packaging (integrity, watertight), tertiary packaging (labeling, temperature logger).

column.name: content
column.value: Transport and Packaging - IATA PI650 compliance documentation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 3

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 4

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Receipt and Quality Assessment page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Receipt & Quality Assessment

column.name: instructions
column.value: Receive samples and perform quality checks. Verify labeling, container integrity, order matching, temperature compliance. Check for hemolysis, lipemia, icterus. Record acceptance or rejection with reasons.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Receipt and Quality Assessment - Sample acceptance criteria validation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 4

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 5

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Routing page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Routing

column.name: instructions
column.value: Route samples to appropriate destinations. Assign to internal analysis, external laboratory, or storage. Create department worklists and track allocation status.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Routing - Department routing and destination assignment

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 5

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 6

changeSet.comment: Create Sample Processing page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Sample Processing

column.name: instructions
column.value: Process samples for testing. Perform centrifugation, serum separation, aliquot creation. Record processing type, derived materials, and parent-child sample relationships.

column.name: content
column.value: Sample Processing - Centrifugation, aliquoting, and derived materials

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 6

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 7

changeSet.comment: Create Testing and Analyzer page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Testing & Analyzer

column.name: instructions
column.value: Execute tests on analyzers. Generate worklists, import results via CSV/HL7. Monitor QC with Levey-Jennings charts and Westgard rules. Track calibration status and handle deviations.

column.name: content
column.value: Testing and Analyzer - Instrument interfacing, QC monitoring, and result import

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 7

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 8

changeSet.comment: Create Result Entry page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Result Entry

column.name: instructions
column.value: Enter test results manually or review auto-imported results. System auto-flags H/L/C based on reference ranges. Add result comments where needed. Validate results for accuracy.

column.name: content
column.value: Result Entry - Manual entry, auto-import review, and result flagging

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 8

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 9

changeSet.comment: Create Validation, Reporting and Performance Monitoring page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Validation, Reporting & Performance Monitoring

column.name: instructions
column.value: Authorize results with supervisor approval. Generate patient reports and track delivery. Monitor lab performance including QC trends, turnaround time, sample acceptance rates, and equipment usage.

column.name: content
column.value: Validation, Reporting and Performance Monitoring - Result approval, report generation, and KPI tracking

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 9

changeSet.author: openelis-medlab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.notebook_page np JOIN clinlims.notebook n ON np.notebook_id = n.id WHERE n.title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND n.is_template = true AND np.page_order = 10

changeSet.comment: Create Disposal, Archiving and Accreditation page for Medical Laboratory notebook

column.name: title
column.value: Disposal, Archiving & Accreditation

column.name: instructions
column.value: Close sample lifecycle with proper disposal or archiving. Document disposal method (incineration, autoclaving, chemical treatment), biobank transfer, and regulatory compliance. Complete audit trail for accreditation.

column.name: content
column.value: Disposal, Archiving and Accreditation - Compliant disposal, biorepository transfer, and audit documentation

column.name: notebook_id
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true)

delete.where: notebook_id = (SELECT id FROM clinlims.notebook WHERE title = 'Medical Laboratory' AND is_template = true) AND page_order = 10
